text: Entering this modern, glass-walled space fills me with a sense of quiet curiosity—a clinical orderliness pervades the environment. There is a gentle hush, magnified by the angled geometry and the subtle anticipation of discovery just beyond the door. Inside, vivid colors and bold letters proclaim the promise of research and development—a celebration of human ingenuity. Here, surrounded by screens and the language of progress, I feel both fascinated and slightly disoriented, as if standing at the threshold of invention itself, uncertain whether to marvel or question. This duality—anticipation and unease—makes me alive to the possibilities of this place.
